title: Improved Lashing Potato
description: A slightly scuffed mod that allows players to pull or be pulled towards mobs using the lashing potato.
body:
# "Improved" Lashing Potato 🥔 A slightly scuffed mod that allows players to pull or be pulled towards mobs using the lashing potato. ### Mobs with less max HP than the player are pulled towards the player. ![grappling_a_sheep](https://github.com/HyperPigeon/ImprovedLashingPotato/assets/58276133/643e477f-124b-4f73-b4a0-905ca2f78bab) ### Mobs with more max HP than the player pull the player towards them. ![grappling_to_golem](https://github.com/HyperPigeon/ImprovedLashingPotato/assets/58276133/65897c4c-d441-4495-92d6-95a6c159d671)
